channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: ‘America Laughs with Matt Friend’ on Sling TV: Here’s How to Watch the Late-Night Comedy Special Online
item.description:
[Energetic music fades out, and the host begins speaking]
Host: "Welcome to our podcast, where we bring you the latest updates on entertainment and more. Tonight, we're excited to talk about a new late-night comedy special that's got everyone buzzing. Say hello to 'America Laughs with Matt Friend', a unique blend of comedy and politics, hosted by comedian Matt Friend.
[Soft music plays in the background]
Host: "The show is set to air on CNN this Friday, April 24th, at 11 p.m. ET, or 8 p.m. PT, and you can also catch it online with Sling TV. Matt Friend himself says, 'Comedy and politics have always had a unique connection, and I'm excited to bring that bipartisan energy to Washington with CNN for this special.'
[Music transitions to a slightly more upbeat tone]
Host: "So, how can you watch 'America Laughs with Matt Friend'? Well, you can tune in to CNN on Friday night, or stream it live on Sling Orange. And if you're a cord-cutter, don't worry – Sling TV has got you covered. With a subscription to Sling Orange, you'll get access to live TV from top-rated cable channels, including CNN, ESPN, and many more.
[Music softens again]
Host: "Plus, Sling TV offers flexible pricing options, starting at just $4.99 for a One-Day Pass. You can choose from a range of passes, including a Three-Day Pass and a Seven-Day Pass, depending on your needs. And remember, prices and channel availability may vary depending on your local TV market.
[Music fades out, and the host wraps up]
Host: "That's all for tonight, folks. Don't miss 'America Laughs with Matt Friend' this Friday on CNN, or streaming live on Sling TV. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the next episode!" [Energetic music fades back in]
